_notes: nRF52840 packaged inside the u-blox NINA-B306 module. Mbed-OS-based Arduino core. NOT 5V tolerant; all GPIOs are 3.3V only. The non-Sense Nano 33 BLE has only the LSM9DS1 IMU; no environmental sensors (those are exclusive to the Sense variant). Wire defaults to A4 (SDA, index 18) / A5 (SCL, index 19) per the variant header.
name: Arduino Nano 33 BLE
special: LSM9DS1 9-axis IMU (accel + gyro + magnetometer) on internal I2C
RGB status LED + user LED on D13
USB Micro-B with native USB CDC (mbed-os-stack)
No LiPo charger, no STEMMA QT
